ownership.description: 25% - The cornerstone. Does the candidate take extreme ownership of failures, or do they default to victimhood and blame-shifting?

conflict_handling.description: 20% - Evaluates the ability to engage in hardcore technical disagreements without damaging interpersonal relationships.

feedback_receptivity.description: 20% - Measures the immediate reaction to being challenged or proven wrong. Defensiveness is a major red flag.

collaboration.description: 15% - The 'Hero' versus 'System Builder' test. Inclination to mentor, document, and leave the codebase better than they found it.

transparency.description: 10% - Honesty about technical limitations, debt, and personal knowledge gaps.

learning_agility.description: 10% - Velocity of adaptation. Not just learning new syntax, but unlearning outdated dogmas.
